mapper.select: SELECT ra.category, ra.rd_rol AS rdRol, ra.wr_rol AS wrRol, ra.mo_rol AS moRol, ra.del_rol AS delRol FROM project_role_user pru JOIN role_authority ra ON ra.role_code = pru.role_code WHERE pru.project_code = #{projectCode} AND pru.user_code = #{userCode} AND ra.category = #{category}

SELECT #{userCode} AS user_code, #{projectCode} AS project_code, CASE WHEN MAX(admin_ck) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS admin_ck, MAX(status) KEEP (DENSE_RANK LAST ORDER BY CASE WHEN admin_ck='Y' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END, status) AS status, MAX(role_name) KEEP (DENSE_RANK LAST ORDER BY CASE WHEN admin_ck='Y' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END, status) AS role_name FROM vw_user_auth WHERE user_code = #{userCode} AND project_code = #{projectCode}
